selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

INPUT:
mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
persona = null

response_raw:
{
"mode": "llm",
"topic": "How to manage and deal with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "Fake content on social media can be damaging, but there are ways to identify and deal with it. Here are some steps you can take: 1) Be aware of the source of the information and verify its credibility before sharing it. 2) Use fact-checking websites and tools to confirm the accuracy of the content. 3) If you find fake content, report it to the platform or account responsible for hosting it. 4) Educate yourself and others on how to identify and avoid fake content. By taking these steps, you can help protect yourself and others from the harmful effects of fake content on social media.",
"reasoning_summary": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be aware of the source of the information and verify its credibility before sharing it. Fact-checking websites and tools can also be used to confirm the accuracy of the content. If fake content is found, it should be reported to the platform or account responsible for hosting it. Additionally, educating oneself and others on how to identify and avoid fake content can help protect individuals from its harmful effects.",
"tone": "informative",
"citations": [],
"safety_notes": "",
"used_persona_fields": ["persona"]
}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and deal with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: Fake content on social media can be damaging, but there are ways to identify and deal with it. Here are some steps you can take: 1) Be aware of the source of the information and verify its credibility before sharing it. 2) Use fact-checking websites and tools to confirm the accuracy of the content. 3) If you find fake content, report it to the platform or account responsible for hosting it. 4) Educate yourself and others on how to identify and avoid fake content. By taking these steps, you can help protect yourself and others from the harmful effects of fake content on social media.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be aware of the source of the information and verify its credibility before sharing it. Fact-checking websites and tools can also be used to confirm the accuracy of the content. If fake content is found, it should be reported to the platform or account responsible for hosting it. Additionally, educating oneself and others on how to identify and avoid fake content can help protect individuals from its harmful effects.
